model: S3 PMP Study Companion v4 — 800 Item Model
validation_scope: Automated structural, blueprint, answer-key, format, and explanation checks; not PMI psychometric calibration
checks: Every item has a unique ID and unique combined stimulus-plus-prompt
Domain and approach counts match the July 2026 PMP blueprint
Every single-response, case-study, and graphic-based key is in range
Every multiple-response item has exactly two distinct valid keys
Every sequence item has a complete one-through-four ordering
Every item has a task, hard difficulty label, explanation, and exam lens
